assessorQuestions: ¿Cuántos años tienes y dónde vives ahora?
¿Cómo es la ciudad donde vives? ¿Hay mucho turismo?
¿Tienes experiencia laboral en el sector de la hostelería?
¿Cuáles son tus planes para las próximas vacaciones?
¿Por qué crees que es importante hablar varios idiomas en hostelería?

guestQuestions: ¿A qué hora se sirve el desayuno?
¿Hay habitaciones para personas con movilidad reducida?
checklist: Use the 'dejarse sorprender por' slogan formula
Present the featured room with all details (furniture + bathroom)
Mention the shuttle service and price
Present the extra facility with hours and pricing
Answer ALL guest questions — include at least one NO answer

data.noTableSituation: No other tables available at this moment (in approximately 25 minutes). Suggest an alternative while guests wait — e.g. a drink at the bar.

dishOfDay.name: Merluza al horno
dishOfDay.ingredients: fresh hake fillet, cherry tomatoes, garlic, white wine
dishOfDay.flavourTexture: delicate and juicy, with a slightly crispy skin

checklist: Greet the guests warmly at the entrance
Check reservation system — identify or seat the guests
If no table available: apologise, give waiting time, suggest alternative
Present the menu and recommend the dish of the day (with description)
Check on guests during the meal
Handle any requests or questions politely
